---
title: "The Treasures in the Marshes"
sort_title: "Treasures in the Marshes"
year: 1893
subtitle: "1893"
slug: "treasures in the marshes"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


*1893*



****[Click here to reach the online text of*The Treasures in the Marshes*  
in various formats, including PDF](http://ia311306.us.archive.org/2/items/treasuresinmars00yonggoog/)**  
**

[Click here to download a PDF file of*The Treasures in the Marshes*](http://ia311306.us.archive.org/2/items/treasuresinmars00yonggoog/treasuresinmars00yonggoog.pdf)**  
**
